display.purpose: Wordmark and hero; stacked, accent word in sky.

heading.purpose: Section titles, underlined by a short sky rule bar.

label.purpose: Uppercase metadata, table headers, small markers.

score.purpose: Scorelines and big stat figures; count up on reveal.

shadows.name: none
shadows.purpose: Flat, printed system. Depth from navy bands, hairlines, halftone, and the single hero floodlight, never drop shadow or glass.

motion.name: ease
motion.purpose: Default ease-out for transitions and the hero reveal.

motion.name: count-up
motion.purpose: Big stat numbers count from 0 when scrolled into view.

motion.name: marquee
motion.purpose: Broadcast stats ticker; static under reduced-motion.

motion.name: floodlight
motion.value: Canvas 2D light cones + drifting motes via requestAnimationFrame
motion.purpose: Hero stadium-light moment; paused off-screen; static CSS glow fallback.

components.name: Primary Button
components.description: Solid sky-blue CTA with navy-deep text; lifts on hover, gold focus ring.
components.css: .ds-btn-primary { font-family: 'Archivo', system-ui, sans-serif; font-weight: 700; font-size: 0.95rem; letter-spacing: 0.01em; color: #0c1733; background: #6CABDD; border: 2px solid transparent; border-radius: 4px; padding: 11px 21px; cursor: pointer; transition: transform 0.25s cubic-bezier(0.16,1,0.3,1), background 0.25s cubic-bezier(0.16,1,0.3,1); } .ds-btn-primary:hover { transform: translateY(-2px); background: #82bce6; } .ds-btn-primary:active { transform: translateY(0); } .ds-btn-primary:focus-visible { outline: 3px solid #FFC659; outline-offset: 2px; }

components.name: Ghost Button (on navy)
components.description: Outline button for secondary actions over a navy band.
components.css: .ds-btn-ghost { font-family: 'Archivo', system-ui, sans-serif; font-weight: 700; font-size: 0.95rem; color: #fff; background: transparent; border: 2px solid rgba(255,255,255,0.4); border-radius: 4px; padding: 11px 21px; cursor: pointer; transition: border-color 0.25s, color 0.25s, transform 0.25s; } .ds-btn-ghost:hover { border-color: #6CABDD; color: #6CABDD; transform: translateY(-2px); } .ds-btn-ghost:focus-visible { outline: 3px solid #FFC659; outline-offset: 2px; }

components.name: Flat Card
components.description: Flat surface defined by fill + hairline; no shadow, no glass.
components.html:
Rendimiento

Superficie plana, sin cristal ni sombra.
components.css: .ds-card { background: #ffffff; border: 1px solid rgba(28,44,91,0.14); border-radius: 6px; padding: 24px; } .ds-card-title { font-family: 'Anton', sans-serif; text-transform: uppercase; font-size: 1.4rem; letter-spacing: 0.01em; color: #1C2C5B; margin: 0 0 8px; } .ds-card-body { font-family: 'Archivo', sans-serif; font-size: 0.95rem; line-height: 1.6; color: #56607a; margin: 0; }

components.name: Feature Scoreline
components.description: Signature: drenched-navy result block with an Anton scoreline and a coloured outcome marker.
components.html:
Liga Local
Manchester Piti3–1Real Cervecería
Victoria
components.css: .ds-feat { background: #1C2C5B; color: #fff; border-radius: 6px; padding: 26px; } .ds-feat-comp { font-family: 'Archivo'; font-size: 0.75rem; font-weight: 700; letter-spacing: 0.18em; text-transform: uppercase; color: #6CABDD; } .ds-feat-line { display: flex; align-items: center; gap: 2rem; margin: 1rem 0 0.6rem; flex-wrap: wrap; } .ds-feat-team { font-family: 'Archivo'; font-weight: 800; font-size: 1.5rem; flex: 1; min-width: 120px; } .ds-feat-team.away { text-align: right; color: #9fb6d6; } .ds-feat-score { font-family: 'Anton', sans-serif; font-size: 4rem; line-height: 0.8; } .ds-feat-score i { color: #54608a; font-style: normal; padding: 0 0.15em; } .ds-feat-out { display: inline-flex; align-items: center; gap: 0.5rem; font-family: 'Archivo'; font-weight: 800; } .ds-feat-out i { width: 10px; height: 10px; border-radius: 2px; background: #6CABDD; display: inline-block; }

components.name: Stat Band
components.description: Season figures as a grid with 1px gap-gridlines over a hairline background; clean at any column count.
components.css: .ds-band { display: grid; grid-template-columns: repeat(4, 1fr); gap: 1px; background: rgba(28,44,91,0.14); border: 1px solid rgba(28,44,91,0.14); border-radius: 6px; overflow: hidden; } .ds-band .c { background: #e9ebf0; padding: 18px 12px; text-align: left; } .ds-band .c b { font-family: 'Anton', sans-serif; font-size: 2.4rem; line-height: 0.9; color: #1C2C5B; display: block; } .ds-band .c.hl b { color: #1C2C5B; } .ds-band .c span { font-family: 'Archivo'; font-size: 0.7rem; font-weight: 700; letter-spacing: 0.12em; text-transform: uppercase; color: #56607a; margin-top: 6px; display: block; }

components.name: Section Heading + Rule
components.description: Anton heading underlined by a short sky rule bar (the cadence that replaces eyebrow kickers).
components.css: .ds-head h2 { font-family: 'Anton', sans-serif; text-transform: uppercase; font-size: 3rem; line-height: 0.92; letter-spacing: 0.01em; color: #1C2C5B; margin: 0; } .ds-rule { display: block; width: 96px; height: 6px; background: #6CABDD; margin-top: 1rem; }

components.name: Result Markers
components.description: Fixed results language: sky win, gold draw, red loss; colour always paired with a letter.
components.html: V E D
components.css: .ds-res { display: inline-flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center; width: 24px; height: 24px; border-radius: 3px; font-family: 'Archivo'; font-weight: 800; font-size: 12px; } .ds-res.v { background: #6CABDD; color: #0c1733; } .ds-res.e { background: #FFC659; color: #3a2c00; } .ds-res.d { background: #C42F23; color: #fff; }

narrative.overview: Manchester Piti takes amateur Sunday-league football and gives it the full elite-broadcast treatment: a floodlit-dark stadium, sky-blue stat overlays, scorelines set like a printed matchday programme. It is an affectionate parody of Manchester City (same sky-blue, borrowed 'Manchester', undercut by 'Piti', Spanish for a cigarette), played completely straight. The system is editorial sports-press, not dark-mode SaaS: a heavy condensed display (Anton) plus a clean grotesque (Archivo), flat printed surfaces, drenched navy bands, hairline rules, and one cinematic floodlight in the hero. It ships in a cool-paper light theme and a floodlit-night dark theme.
keyCharacteristics: Real Manchester City palette: sky #6CABDD, navy #1C2C5B, gold #FFC659.
Heavy condensed display (Anton) + grotesque body (Archivo); scoreboard numerals.
Flat, printed surfaces with hairline rules and halftone texture; no glass, no glow.
Light (cool paper) and dark (floodlit night) themes, toggle-switched.
Stats staged as silverware; numbers count up; one floodlight moment in the hero.

rules.name: The Results-Language Rule
rules.body: Sky = win/positive, gold = draw/record/caution, red = loss/danger. Fixed everywhere, always paired with a non-colour cue. Never recolour a result for decoration.

rules.name: The Earn-the-Light Rule
rules.body: Sky-blue is an accent and the hero's one floodlight, not ambient glow. No element glows at rest.

rules.name: The Cool-Paper Rule
rules.body: The light theme background is a true cool off-white (#e9ebf0), never warm cream/sand/paper.

rules.name: The Two-Family Rule
rules.body: Anton for display, Archivo for everything else. Never a third family or a serif.

rules.name: The Rule-Bar Cadence
rules.body: Section headings get a short sky rule bar beneath, never a tiny uppercase tracked eyebrow above.

rules.name: The Flat-Print Rule
rules.body: Surfaces are flat. No glassmorphism, no decorative drop shadow, no ghost-card, no ambient glow. Depth is navy, rules, texture, and the one floodlight.

dos: Do anchor on the real Man City palette: sky #6CABDD, navy #1C2C5B, gold #FFC659.
Do use Anton for display/numbers and Archivo for everything else; nothing else.
Do keep surfaces flat and printed: hairlines, gap-gridlines, halftone, drenched navy bands.
Do support both themes via the --mp-* tokens and [data-theme]; ship the persistent toggle.
Do hold the results language fixed (sky win / gold draw / red loss) with a non-colour cue.
Do stage stats as silverware: Anton numerals, count-up, a podium, a scoreline.
Do mark section headings with a short sky rule bar.
donts: Don't reuse the superseded identity: cyan #06b6d4 glow, glassmorphism blur cards, gradient text, or the Outfit font.
Don't drift toward a generic SaaS dashboard or anything corporate / sterile.
Don't put a tiny uppercase tracked eyebrow above every section; use the rule-bar cadence.
Don't round cards past 6px, add decorative drop shadows, or pair a 1px border with a soft wide shadow.
Don't let the light theme become warm cream/sand; keep it a true cool off-white.
Don't add ambient glow; the only luminous moment is the hero floodlight.
Don't explain the parody. Play the spectacle straight; let the 'Piti' naming carry the wink.
